title: Xtra Crispy Dutch Chicken Wrap
description: A crispy and citrusy Dutch dish featuring pitted black olives and leaf-wrap-steam, perfect for a date night, kosher-friendly
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken strips to the bowl and toss to coat.
Place the chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
While the chicken is baking, prepare the lettuce leaves by washing and drying them.
Once the chicken is done, let it cool for a few minutes.
Assemble the wraps by placing a few pieces of chicken onto a lettuce leaf, topping with black olives and shredded carrots.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
